description_long: This is a single-propeller, military-style airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a camouflage paint scheme in shades of gray and green. The wings are straight and mid-mounted, with red star insignias on both the wings and tail, indicating Soviet or Russian origin. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy, positioned just behind the propeller and ahead of the tail section, and appears to be a single-seat configuration. The tail features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, both marked with red stars. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it may be retractable or modeled in a retracted state. The propeller is depicted in motion, with a blurred disc effect at the nose of the aircraft.
description: A gray and green camouflaged, single-propeller military airplane with red star insignias, an enclosed cockpit, and a conventional tail design.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the spinning propeller, cockpit canopy, and left wing with red star insignia.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the side profile, cockpit, and both red star insignias on the wing and tail.
description_view_2: Rear-left view displaying the tail section, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the rear fuselage.
description_view_3: Rear-right view focusing on the right wing, tail, and the blurred propeller at the nose.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable taildragger configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
